text:
American fans are excited to see many of the Team USA athletes compete at the 2024 Paris Olympics, one star being track and field phenom Sha'Carri Richardson.

The sprinter will make her Olympic debut in Paris after her campaign to make the Tokyo Olympics was cut when she tested positive for THC when she took an anti-doping violation.

Richardson enters the Paris Olympicshaving just set a record time of 10.71 secondsin the 100-meter qualifier at the Olympic Trials in June. She will be competing in the 100-meter race in Paris.

If you want to tune in to Richardson's competitions, here's her race schedule.

Women's 100m Final

Richardson's Olympic campaign began Aug. 2 with the women's 100-meter preliminary round and first round. She was dominant in her first showing with a 10.94, advancing to the semifinal on Saturday.

Welcome to the Olympic Games, ShaâCarri Richardson!#ParisOlympicsðº E! and Peacockpic.twitter.com/qxtT9xLALw

Impressively, her dominancedidn't even crack her personal top-10 for the event.

The track and field events happening overnight in American time zones will be shown in NBC's primetime show starting at 8 p.m. ET on those nights. The live event can be watched on USA Network and E!, and fans can also stream the races on Peacock.

title: How to Watch Sha'Carri Richardson at the 2024 Paris Olympics
description: The sprinter makes her highly anticipated Olympic debut in Paris.
